title: astragalus jesupii
intro: Astragalus jesupii is a rare, perennial legume plant native to China, belonging to the Astragalus genus, which is commonly known as milk vetch. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus jesupii include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and lowering blood pressure, making it a popular herb in the treatment of various health conditions. Astragalus jesupii is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are typically standardized to contain high levels of astragalosides, the bioactive compounds responsible for its medicinal properties.
